notes: Solid, complete Breakout implementation with proper physics, audio, mouse/keyboard controls, score, lives, and win/lose states; minor issue with brick collision detection using prev-position heuristic that can occasionally misfire.
An exceptionally well-crafted Breakout clone with flawless mechanics, robust collision detection, smooth controls (both keyboard and mouse), and a great Web Audio implementation.
A solid and complete Breakout implementation with working serve/lives/bricks and no obvious errors, but it lacks polish like robust collision handling and fully classic presentation.
